MCAR_autompg_horsepower.source: UCI Auto MPG / OpenML autoMpg v1
MCAR_autompg_horsepower.x0_description: Engine power output of the automobile
MCAR_autompg_horsepower.missing_context: Horsepower not recorded for some car models during data collection. Administrative failure in technical documentation, unrelated to the actual horsepower value or vehicle characteristics.

MCAR_breastcancer_barenuclei.x0_description: Bare nuclei score from fine needle aspiration (FNA) biopsy
MCAR_breastcancer_barenuclei.missing_context: Values missing due to errors in biopsy recording or unreadable slides. The failure occurs independently of the cytological result — it is a laboratory process issue, not a clinical one.

MCAR_cylinderbands_bladepressure.x0_description: Doctor blade pressure used to control ink thickness on the printing cylinder
MCAR_cylinderbands_bladepressure.missing_context: Blade pressure sensor fails intermittently during press operation. The failure is mechanical/electrical, unrelated to the pressure level being measured. Measurement equipment with limited reliability.

MCAR_cylinderbands_esavoltage.x0_description: Electrostatic assist (ESA) system voltage that aids ink transfer
MCAR_cylinderbands_esavoltage.missing_context: ESA voltage sensor fails independently of the voltage level. The ESA system is not always active during operation, and when turned off, the reading is not recorded — a standard operational decision, not based on the value.

MCAR_hypothyroid_t4u.x0_description: T4 uptake ratio — thyroid function test measuring serum protein binding capacity for T4 hormone
MCAR_hypothyroid_t4u.missing_context: T4U test not ordered as part of the standard thyroid test battery. The decision not to order is administrative (laboratory protocol), not based on the patient's clinical results.

MAR_airquality_ozone.source: NY State Dept. of Conservation / National Weather Service (1973 data)
MAR_airquality_ozone.x0_description: Mean daily tropospheric ozone concentration in New York
MAR_airquality_ozone.missing_context: Ozone measurements not taken on days with adverse weather conditions — strong wind and low temperature hinder monitor operation. The probability of data collection depends on observable weather conditions, not on the ozone level itself.

MAR_oceanbuoys_humidity.source: NOAA TAO Project (Tropical Atmosphere Ocean) / R naniar package
MAR_oceanbuoys_humidity.x0_description: Relative air humidity measured by oceanic buoy in the tropical Pacific
MAR_oceanbuoys_humidity.missing_context: Buoy humidity sensor fails more frequently under high sea surface temperature and strong wind conditions. The failure is correlated with meteorological conditions, not with the humidity level itself.

MAR_oceanbuoys_airtemp.source: NOAA TAO Project / R naniar package
MAR_oceanbuoys_airtemp.x0_description: Air temperature measured by oceanic buoy in the tropical Pacific
MAR_oceanbuoys_airtemp.missing_context: Air temperature sensor fails correlated with sea temperature and wind intensity conditions. Sensor reliability degrades under extreme meteorological conditions, but does not depend on the air temperature itself.

MAR_mammographic_density.x0_description: Breast tissue density classification: 1=high density, 2=iso, 3=low density, 4=fat-containing
MAR_mammographic_density.x0_typical_range: 1-4 (original ordinal, converted to continuous with jitter)
MAR_mammographic_density.missing_context: Radiologist omits density classification when BI-RADS classification and age already indicate a clear diagnosis (benign or malignant). The decision to record or not depends on observed clinical variables, not on the density value itself.

MAR_sick_t3.x0_description: Serum triiodothyronine (T3) level — active thyroid hormone
MAR_sick_t3.missing_context: T3 test selectively ordered by physician based on clinical symptoms and TSH/TT4 results. If TSH and TT4 are normal, the physician generally does not order T3. The decision depends on already observed clinical variables.

MAR_sick_tsh.x0_description: Serum thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) level — primary regulator of thyroid function
MAR_sick_tsh.missing_context: TSH not ordered when the overall clinical picture and other thyroid indicators do not suggest dysfunction. The decision is clinical and depends on symptoms and already available test results.

MAR_titanic_age.x0_description: Age of the RMS Titanic passenger (1912)
MAR_titanic_age.missing_context: Age not recorded for many 3rd-class passengers. The ship's registration crew and authorities prioritized documentation of higher-class passengers. The probability of recording depends on social class and fare paid, not on age itself.

MAR_titanic_age_v2.x0_description: Age of the RMS Titanic passenger (1912) — alternative dataset version
MAR_titanic_age_v2.missing_context: Same context as titanic_age — age not recorded preferentially for lower-class passengers. Alternative dataset version may have preprocessing differences.

MAR_kidney_hemo.x0_description: Blood hemoglobin level — indicator of anemia, common in chronic kidney disease
MAR_kidney_hemo.missing_context: Hemoglobin tested more frequently in patients with severe disease indicators (high urea, altered blood pressure). Early-stage patients with normal basic tests may not have hemoglobin measured. The decision depends on severity observed through other tests.

X3.name: thalach
X3.role: Maximum heart rate during stress test

MAR_hearth_chol.missing_context: Cholesterol not tested when primary cardiac indicators (ECG, blood pressure, maximum heart rate) do not suggest significant risk. The decision to order the test depends on other cardiological test results.

MAR_colic_resprate.x0_description: Horse respiratory rate — vital sign in equine colic assessment
MAR_colic_resprate.missing_context: Respiratory rate not measured when other vital signs (pulse, temperature) already indicate severity level. In veterinary emergencies, professionals prioritize intervention over complete documentation. The decision depends on clinical assessment based on other signs.

MNAR_pima_insulin.x0_description: Serum insulin concentration 2 hours after oral glucose tolerance test (OGTT)
MNAR_pima_insulin.missing_context: Serum insulin test is expensive and invasive. In the original dataset, zero values (biologically impossible) represent tests not performed. The test tends not to be ordered when glucose is in the normal range and the physician does not suspect diabetes. Additionally, patients with very high insulin may have results discarded due to laboratory doubt.

MNAR_mroz_wages.source: Mroz (1987) - Female Labor Supply, PSID 1975 / Econometrica
MNAR_mroz_wages.x0_description: Natural logarithm of the woman's hourly wage
MNAR_mroz_wages.missing_context: Wage observed only for women who participate in the labor market. Women who do not work have missing wages because the value simply does not exist. The decision to work is related to potential wage — women with low potential earnings tend not to enter the market. Classic example of selection bias (Heckman, 1979).

MNAR_kidney_pot.x0_description: Serum potassium level — critical electrolyte for cardiac and muscular function
MNAR_kidney_pot.missing_context: Extreme potassium values (very high or very low) are difficult to measure accurately in the laboratory. Samples may be hemolyzed (cell destruction during collection), releasing intracellular potassium and generating a false result. Laboratories frequently discard or do not report these suspicious measurements.

MNAR_kidney_sod.x0_description: Serum sodium level — primary electrolyte for osmotic balance
MNAR_kidney_sod.missing_context: Similar to potassium — extreme sodium values not reliably reported. Laboratories may reject samples with values far outside the normal range, considering them possible analytical errors. Critically ill patients with highly altered sodium may have more difficult sample collection.

MNAR_colic_refluxph.x0_description: pH of fluid obtained by nasogastric intubation in the horse — indicates acidity of refluxed gastric content
MNAR_colic_refluxph.missing_context: Nasogastric reflux pH is only measurable when there is significant reflux volume. Horses with little or no reflux do not have enough sample to measure pH. The presence of reflux is correlated with the severity of intestinal obstruction, and extreme volumes (very high) produce samples that are difficult to process.

MNAR_cylinderbands_varnishpct.x0_description: Varnish percentage applied to the rotogravure printing cylinder
MNAR_cylinderbands_varnishpct.missing_context: Varnish percentage not recorded when batch quality is outside specifications (too high or too low). Line operators tend not to fully document batches with severe quality issues, focusing on immediate correction rather than recording.

MNAR_adult_capitalgain.source: UCI Adult Census Income Dataset / OpenML
MNAR_adult_capitalgain.x0_description: Capital gain from investments in the fiscal year
MNAR_adult_capitalgain.x0_typical_range: 0-99999 USD, but most of the population has 0

X4.name: capital_loss
X4.role: Individual's capital loss in fiscal year

MNAR_adult_capitalgain.missing_context: Capital gains only reported by people with investments that generated profit. Most of the population has zero gains (not missing, but literal zero). Missing values represent non-reporting — people with low gains have less financial and legal incentive to report in detail. The missing value is related to the gain amount itself.
